name: Louie Ramirez
abstract: Louie Ramirez (February 24, 1938 – June 7, 1993) was an American salsa and latin jazz percussionist, vibraphonist, arranger and composer. He co-wrote with Johnny Pacheco the 1961 hit "El Güiro De Macorina".

about_quotes.speaker: Marty Sheller
about_quotes.evidence: just by playing in his band and absorbing how he approached the rhythms
about_quotes.doc_title: Marty Sheller interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, May 9, 2022
